[10/12/25, 16.01.11] Karim гӮ«гғӘгғ в–ӘпёҸ COO Daytrip: Hi Team! Following Alex's message from last week, I'd like to add that we're having the worst November and most likely December too in the last three years, with the new bookings dropping more than x2 compared to November 2024 which is more that we've planned and forecasted. You can see it yourself by the number of trips/boats we have each day now. This is happening not only to us, but to other tours, experiences and attractions too, due to number of reasons such as negative publicity around Bali as a destination in general around the world (protests, floodings, capsized boats), weather and rain season that is expected to be the worst this year due to вҖңla ninaвҖқ phenomenon, and more frequent reviews from travel bloggers calling Bali overrated with a lot of overdevelopment, overtourism and gila traffic.

However, weвҖҷll keep a total of 20 jt. bonus pool for the reviews and surveys. This monthly pool is to be distributed based on pro-rata number of reviews, pak @вҒЁGee DTBвҒ©  to update us on the November results. WeвҖҷll keep this pool till the end of low season, e.g. end of March, then back to normal. Thanks and keep up the good work on getting reviews after your trips рҹҷҸрҹҸј

WeвҖҷve also printed A5 leaflets with the QR-code link to the survey, already in Serangan office, that pak @вҒЁGee DTBвҒ©  will distribute to you. Please, hand them in to customers at the end of the trip. These surveys really help us understand our current customers, their segmentation, brand awareness, decision factors, and much more. 

Again, thanks a lot for all your work and loyalty. LetвҖҷs wish us all more good weather days and low season to end sooner рҹҚҖ вҖҺ<This message was edited>

[10/12/25, 16.41.27] Gee DTB: рҹ”ө *Bonus Update вҖ” Please Read*

For November, the total Review Bonus has been set at IDR 20,000,000, and it will be distributed pro-rated based on each personвҖҷs total number of reviews.

What this means:
вһЎпёҸ The bonus is not a fixed amount per review.
вһЎпёҸ Instead, the 20 million budget is divided proportionally according to everyoneвҖҷs contribution.
вһЎпёҸ Since the team produced 295 reviews in total, each personвҖҷs bonus will be calculated based on their share of those 295 reviews.

Thank you once again for your effort, consistency, and hard work! рҹҷҸрҹ”Ҙ вҖҺ<This message was edited>
